summary: Completed comprehensive testing of UI simplification features for Fantasy Timeline application. Most features working correctly with minor issues identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Tools menu overlay intercepts pointer events on zoom controls, requiring force clicks
ui_bugs.details: Tools menu positioned below zoom controls creates overlay that blocks normal clicks on zoom buttons

ui_bugs.issue: Sidebar transform not updating when timeline scrolls vertically
ui_bugs.details: Sidebar should sync with timeline vertical scroll via CSS transform but transform remains 'none'

passed_tests: Header simplified to only show title and description - no buttons
Timeline picker correctly positioned in top-left corner
Tools menu (gear icon) positioned below zoom controls
Add Track option in Tools menu opens modal correctly
Theme toggle (Sci-Fi Mode / Fantasy Mode) works correctly
Timeline Settings in Tools menu opens edit form
Export JSON in Tools menu functions
Left sidebar has no scrollbar (overflow-y: hidden)
All modal forms open and close correctly
Theme switching between Fantasy and Sci-Fi modes works
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix overlay issue where Tools menu intercepts clicks on zoom controls. Verify sidebar scroll synchronization implementation - transform should update when timeline scrolls vertically.
